final_answer_preview:
- It’s describing the Engineering Onboarding Guide, focusing on the first two weeks of onboarding for new engineers.
- Week 1: Set up your development environment using the DevSetup script in the Platform repo; install Docker; configure VPN; request access to Azure DevOps; a buddy is assigned by your manager.
- Week 2: Shadow your team; attend the weekly architecture review every Tuesday at 10:00
